overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail during a dramatic orange sunset. The character travels from a stone-walled section through open woodland, passing other travelers and crossing a stream before approaching a rural building as dusk deepens into night.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with ancient stone wall ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, moving toward the setting sun

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side, covered in moss
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
dense pine trees lining both sides of the trail
dramatic orange and red sunset sky visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow forest trail bordered by a moss-covered stone wall on the left. The path winds through dense pine forest as the sun sets ahead, casting long shadows and bathing the scene in warm orange light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest path with wooden fencing and stream crossing

events.description: group of travelers appear walking toward the camera on the path
path leads to a small stream with reflective water surface

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path, passing other travelers and approaching a water crossing

notable_agents.action: two travelers in medieval clothing walking toward Geralt, passing by on the left side of the path

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence running along the right side of the path
narrow stream with reflective water surface crossing the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the stone wall disappears, revealing more of the vibrant sunset sky. Geralt passes two travelers walking in the opposite direction, then approaches and crosses a small stream. A wooden fence appears on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing approaching a rural thatched-roof building

events.description: thatched roof hut becomes visible ahead as the sky darkens to deep red

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant building as dusk settles and the ambient light fades significantly

entered.detail: small rural building with triangular thatched roof visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: After crossing the stream, the path continues toward a thatched-roof hut visible in the distance. The sky transitions from bright orange to deep crimson and purple as night approaches, and the surrounding forest becomes darker silhouettes against the fading light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transforms from a sun-drenched woodland path into a darkening rural landscape at twilight. It begins with Geralt walking beside a moss-covered stone wall, winding through a dense pine forest bathed in warm orange light. As the stone wall disappears and the trail opens up, the camera follows him past two oncoming travelers and across a small stream, where a wooden fence emerges along the path. The scene then shifts toward a distant thatched-roof hut as the vibrant orange sky deepens into crimson and purple. Finally, the surrounding forest fades into dark silhouettes against the dying light as night settles over the countryside.
